name: ai-translate
title: AI Translate
description: Translate selected text, translate screenshots, or extract screenshot text with OCR and AI providers.
author: xianwei_zhang

commands.name: translate
commands.title: Translate Selected Text
commands.subtitle: AI Translate
commands.description: Translate selected text, fallback text, or typed text with your configured AI provider.

commands.name: screenshot-translate
commands.title: Translate Screenshot
commands.subtitle: AI Translate
commands.description: Capture a screen region, OCR it, and translate the recognized text.

commands.name: extract-text-from-screenshot
commands.title: Extract Text from Screenshot
commands.subtitle: AI Translate
commands.description: Capture a screen region, OCR it, and review or edit the extracted text before copying or translating it.

commands.name: copy-text-from-screenshot
commands.title: Copy Text from Screenshot
commands.subtitle: AI Translate
commands.description: Capture a screen region, OCR it, and copy the recognized text to the clipboard without opening a result view.

preferences.title: Default Provider
preferences.name: defaultProvider
preferences.description: Provider shown first and used when no provider checkbox is enabled.

preferences.title: Target Language
preferences.name: targetLanguage
preferences.description: Auto translates Chinese text to English and other text to Simplified Chinese.

preferences.title: Translation Style
preferences.name: translationStyle
preferences.description: Controls how literal or polished the sentence translation should be.

preferences.title: OCR Text Layout
preferences.name: ocrTextLayout
preferences.description: Formatted preserves OCR line breaks; compact collapses whitespace into one line.

preferences.name: ocrFallbackToLocal
preferences.label: Fallback to local OCR
preferences.description: If an API OCR engine fails, OCR the same screenshot with local macOS Vision.

preferences.title: Tesseract Path
preferences.name: tesseractPath
preferences.description: Path or command name for Tesseract. Install with `brew install tesseract` if needed.

preferences.title: Tesseract Languages
preferences.name: tesseractLanguages
preferences.description: Tesseract language list, for example eng, chi_sim, or eng+chi_sim.

preferences.title: Baidu OCR API Key
preferences.name: baiduOcrAPIKey
preferences.description: Baidu AI Open Platform OCR API Key.

preferences.title: Baidu OCR Secret Key
preferences.name: baiduOcrSecretKey
preferences.description: Baidu AI Open Platform OCR Secret Key.

preferences.title: Baidu OCR Endpoint
preferences.name: baiduOcrEndpoint
preferences.description: Baidu OCR endpoint. General is faster; accurate is better for complex screenshots.

preferences.title: PaddleOCR HTTP Endpoint
preferences.name: paddleOcrEndpoint
preferences.description: Self-hosted PaddleOCR service endpoint, usually http://localhost:8080/ocr.

preferences.title: PaddleOCR API Key
preferences.name: paddleOcrAPIKey
preferences.description: Optional bearer token for your PaddleOCR HTTP service.

preferences.title: Max Output Tokens
preferences.name: maxOutputTokens
preferences.description: Maximum generated tokens for chat-compatible providers.

preferences.title: DeepSeek Model
preferences.name: deepseekModel
preferences.description: DeepSeek model name. Official current options include deepseek-v4-flash and deepseek-v4-pro.

preferences.title: Xiaomi MiMo Base URL
preferences.name: mimoBaseURL
preferences.description: Anthropic-compatible Xiaomi MiMo base URL. Use https://token-plan-cn.xiaomimimo.com/anthropic for Token Plan.

preferences.title: Xiaomi MiMo Model
preferences.name: mimoModel
preferences.description: Xiaomi MiMo model name. Text options include mimo-v2-flash, mimo-v2.5, mimo-v2.5-pro, mimo-v2-pro, and mimo-v2-omni.

preferences.title: MiniMax Model
preferences.name: minimaxModel
preferences.description: MiniMax model name. Anthropic-compatible options include MiniMax-M2.7 and MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed.

preferences.title: Kimi Base URL
preferences.name: kimiBaseURL
preferences.description: Kimi/Moonshot Anthropic-compatible entrypoint. Requests are sent to /v1/messages.

preferences.title: Kimi Model
preferences.name: kimiModel
preferences.description: Kimi model name. Official current default is kimi-k2.6; other options include kimi-k2.5 and moonshot-v1-8k/32k/128k.

scripts.predev: npm run generate-icons && npm run build-swift
scripts.prebuild: npm run generate-icons && npm run build-swift
